stemHtml: What factors are considered when determining DA/DH?

options.a: The OCA/H based on the highest obstacle in the approach or missed approach paths, an allowance for aircraft speed and height loss on go-around, plus a margin for operational factors.
options.b: The OCA/H based on the highest obstacle in the missed approach path only, plus a height-loss allowance for go-around.
options.c: The OCA/H based on the highest obstacle in the final approach path only, plus a go-around margin.
options.d: The OCA/H based on the highest obstacle in the final approach path including an aircraft speed allowance, plus a margin.
